Class JavaStatement

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.statement.JavaStatement
All Implemented Interfaces:
ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, Statement, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
Assert, BranchStatement, JmlAssert, JumpStatement, LabeledStatement, LoopScopeBlock, LoopStatement, MergePointStatement, MethodFrame, SetStatement, StatementBlock, SynchronizedBlock, TransactionStatement
public abstract class JavaStatement extends JavaNonTerminalProgramElement implements Statement
Default implementation for non-terminal Java statements.
